Popular Temple Trips

Sacred pilgrimages and spiritual journeys.

PILGRIMAGE

Tirupati Balaji Darshan Package

Complete darshan package with accommodation assistance and guided darshan.

Book Tirupati Balaji Darshan Package
PILGRIMAGE

Thiruvannamalai Girivalam (1 Day / Night Trip)

A peaceful spiritual trip for Girivalam or temple darshan. Trip Info - Chennai → Thiruvannamalai → Chennai - 250 km approx - Popular for Pournami Girivalam

Book Thiruvannamalai Girivalam (1 Day / Night Trip)
PILGRIMAGE

Chidambaram Natarajar Temple Trip

A spiritually rich trip with a relaxed journey.

Book Chidambaram Natarajar Temple Trip
PILGRIMAGE

Rameswaram (2-Day Trip)

Long, peaceful coastal travel. Suitable for families & senior devotees.

Book Rameswaram (2-Day Trip)
PILGRIMAGE

Navagraha Temple Tour (1 Day or 2 Days)

A complete spiritual journey covering the nine planetary temples (Navagrahas) around Kumbakonam. This trip is designed to help you complete your pariharams and prayers with peace of mind.

Book Navagraha Temple Tour (1 Day or 2 Days)
PILGRIMAGE

Sabarimala Yatra 2025-26 (Chennai to Pamba)

A sacred journey to the abode of Lord Ayyappa. We understand the sanctity of the 41-day Vratham and ensure our drivers respect the spiritual atmosphere of your trip. Our vehicles are cleaned and prepared for the pilgrimage.

Book Sabarimala Yatra 2025-26 (Chennai to Pamba)
View All

Popular Destinations

Explore heritage sites, beaches, and city tours.

DESTINATION

Pondicherry Day Trip

Escape to the French Riviera of the East. Visit the serene Auroville, the beautiful Promenade Beach, Manakula Vinayagar Temple, and the French Colony. Perfect for a one-day getaway with family or friends.

Explore Pondicherry Day Trip
DESTINATION

Mahabalipuram & ECR Temples

Explore the UNESCO World Heritage sites of Mahabalipuram including the Shore Temple, Five Rathas, and Arjuna's Penance. Enjoy a scenic drive along the East Coast Road (ECR) with options to visit other temples en route.

Explore Mahabalipuram & ECR Temples
DESTINATION

Chennai City Sightseeing (1 Day Trip)

Explore Chennai’s iconic locations with a flexible plan. Visit ancient temples, colonial monuments, and the vibrant Marina Beach.

Explore Chennai City Sightseeing (1 Day Trip)
View All

Common Questions About Taxi Services in Chennai

Find answers to frequently asked questions about our temple tours, corporate travel, and outstation cabs.

Do you offer one-way drops from Chennai to other cities?

Yes, we provide affordable one-way drop taxi services from Chennai to major cities like Bangalore, Coimbatore, Trichy, and Madurai. You only pay for the one-way distance traveled.

What vehicles are available for temple tour packages?

We have a diverse fleet suitable for all group sizes, including Swift Dzire (4 pax), Toyota Etios (4 pax), Innova Crysta (6-7 pax), and Tempo Traveller (12+ pax) for larger family pilgrimages to Tirupati, Rameswaram, and Navagraha temples.

Are driver batta and toll charges included?

Our package estimates usually include driver batta. However, toll gate charges, parking fees, and interstate permit taxes are to be paid directly by the guest as per actuals.

Do you offer airport pickup and drop services?

Yes, we provide 24/7 reliable airport taxi services for Chennai International Airport (MAA). Pre-book your ride to ensure on-time pickup or drop-off.

Can I book a cab for local Chennai sightseeing?

Absolutely! We offer 8hrs/80km and 12hrs/120km packages for local city tours, shopping, and beach visits within Chennai.

Is it safe for night travel?

Yes, safety is our priority. All our drivers are background-verified and experienced in night driving. We also track our vehicles for added security.

How do I pay for the ride?

You can pay via cash, Google Pay, PhonePe, or bank transfer directly to the driver or owner after the trip completion.

Do you offer corporate employee transportation?

Yes, we specialize in corporate employee pickup and drops, as well as monthly cab services for companies in OMR, Guindy, and Siruseri IT parks.

Can I customize my tour package?

Yes, all our temple tour and holiday packages are fully customizable. Tell us your preferred destinations, and we will plan the itinerary for you.

How far in advance should I book?

For local trips, 4 hours notice is sufficient. For outstation and long temple tours, we recommend booking at least 24-48 hours in advance to secure the best vehicle.

Travel Awareness & Safety

Your safety is our priority. Verified resources and emergency contacts.

Travel Responsibility

Important safety & responsible travel guidelines for passengers.

Official Govt. Resources

Verified Tamil Nadu Government tourism & travel portals.

Kaaval Uthavi App

Get quick police assistance, SOS alerts, emergency location sharing.
Download App

Emergency Helpline

Police: 100 Ambulance: 108 National Emergency: 112 Women Helpline: 1091 Highway Patrol: 103
Call Now
​

Passenger Travel Responsibility

  • ✓ Respect the Vehicle: Please help us keep the car clean. Avoid littering or leaving trash behind.
  • ✓ No Smoking/Alcohol: Consumption of alcohol and smoking is strictly prohibited inside the vehicle.
  • ✓ Punctuality: Please adhere to the scheduled pickup and drop-off timings to ensure a smooth journey.
  • ✓ Safety First: Always wear seatbelts while the vehicle is in motion. It is for your own safety.
  • ✓ Driver Interaction: Treat our drivers with respect. They are trained professionals here to serve you.
​
